suggestions: I'm grateful for the quiet moments of peace before Fajr to set my intentions for the day.
I'm thankful for that satisfying feeling when a complex bug I've been wrestling with all week finally gets resolved.
I'm grateful for the rezeki of a stable career that allows me to support both myself and my family.
I'm thankful for an iced teh tarik and a good chat with colleagues during our afternoon break.
I'm grateful for a smooth production deployment today with absolutely zero unexpected rollbacks.
I'm thankful for the heavy afternoon rain that cooled down the heat and made the drive home so peaceful.
I'm grateful for a supportive tech lead who encourages me to learn rather than blaming me when things break.
I'm thankful for the convenience of the LRT running on time during my morning commute.
I'm grateful for the blessing of having a dedicated, quiet surau at the office to step away and recharge.
I'm thankful for the warm, comforting taste of nasi lemak waiting for me on a Friday morning.
I'm grateful for my pull request being approved without any endless comment threads or major changes needed.
I'm thankful for the late-night mamak sessions where I can unwind and laugh with my childhood friends.
I'm grateful for the flexibility of work-from-home days, letting me skip the heavy LDP traffic.
I'm thankful for my parents' prayers and their constant support as I navigate my career.
I'm grateful for the focus and flow state I found today, helping me clear my sprint backlog ahead of schedule.
